prompt: Hyperrealistic 3D scientific visualization of a guided microscopy laboratory practice, featuring: a modern compound light microscope with brass and matte black finish, illuminated LED stage with a prepared glass slide showing stained biological specimen (plant cell or blood smear); gloved hands carefully adjusting the fine focus knob and positioning a micropipette nearby; laboratory glassware arranged neatly (beakers with colored reagents, Erlenmeyer flask, coverslips, lens paper); floating minimalist holographic labels indicating magnification levels (40x, 100x, 400x), scale bars, and technique icons (staining, mounting, calibration); the title "Práctica Guiada: Microscopía" rendered in clean, backlit glass typography; soft studio lighting with volumetric rays, shallow depth of field focusing on the eyepiece and specimen, smooth anti-aliased edges; background: gradient from deep academic blue to soft neutral white, with subtle hexagonal lattice pattern evoking cellular structure; style: photorealistic materials (glass refraction, metal brushed texture, latex gloves), Octane Render quality, 8K resolution, educational aesthetic, no clutter, professional scientific illustration.

Hyperrealistic 3D educational visualization of a formative assessment workshop in science education, featuring: a collaborative classroom setting with diverse educators and students gathered around a modern table, actively reviewing student work; central floating holographic rubric grid with clear criteria (scientific inquiry, data analysis, conceptual understanding, communication) and performance levels (emerging, developing, proficient, exemplary) highlighted in soft glowing colors; hands holding tablets displaying annotated lab reports with constructive feedback comments, color-coded sticky notes with growth-oriented suggestions, and printed rubrics with checkmarks and marginalia; subtle floating icons representing feedback loops, self-assessment, peer review, and learning progressions; the title "Taller: Evaluación Formativa en Ciencias con Rúbricas" rendered in clean, backlit glass typography centered in the composition; soft studio lighting with volumetric rays, shallow depth of field focusing on the rubric and collaborative interaction, smooth anti-aliased edges; background: gradient from deep academic blue to warm pedagogical amber, with subtle geometric pattern evoking structure and growth; style: photorealistic materials (tablet screen reflection, paper texture, fabric, wood grain), Octane Render quality, 8K resolution, educational aesthetic, inclusive representation, no clutter, professional academic illustration.

Hyperrealistic 3D educational visualization of a basic programming workshop for teachers, no people, square composition: a clean modern desk featuring two open laptops side by side, the left screen displaying a colorful block-based programming interface (Scratch-style) with Spanish labels ("al presionar bandera verde", "repetir", "si entonces"), the right screen showing a dark-mode Python code editor with syntax highlighting and Spanish comments ("# Bucle for", "def calcular_promedio():"); floating holographic labels in Spanish only: "Pensamiento Computacional", "De Bloques a Código", "Integración Áulica", "Recursos Reutilizables" connected by elegant glowing data lines to the screens; subtle programming metaphors: flowchart nodes, variable boxes, loop arrows, function brackets resting as miniature physical objects; the title "Taller: Programación Básica para Docentes (Scratch/Python)" rendered in clean, backlit glass typography with Spanish text only, centered in the upper third; soft studio lighting with volumetric rays, shallow depth of field focusing on the dual screens and holographic elements, smooth anti-aliased edges; background: gradient from deep academic blue to vibrant pedagogical teal, with subtle binary/circuit grid pattern evoking computational thinking; style: photorealistic materials (matte aluminum chassis, glossy screen reflections, glowing UI elements, glass text), Octane Render quality, optimized for 600x600px, 1:1 aspect ratio, educational aesthetic, strictly no humans, no clutter, professional academic illustration.

Hyperrealistic 3D scientific visualization of a university Biophysical Chemistry course, featuring: a central hybrid molecular structure blending a protein alpha-helix with DNA double helix, rendered in translucent glass and metallic materials with subtle subsurface scattering; surrounding key biophysical elements: enzyme-substrate complex with activation energy diagram, lipid bilayer membrane with ion channels, fluorescence spectroscopy light paths, and thermodynamic equations (ΔG = ΔH - TΔS, Michaelis-Menten kinetics) floating as elegant holographic overlays; laboratory context: modern spectrophotometer, microcentrifuge, and electrophoresis gel subtly integrated in the background; the title "Curso Universitario: Biofisicoquímica" rendered in clean, backlit glass typography centered in the composition; soft studio lighting with volumetric rays, shallow depth of field focusing on the central molecular structure, smooth anti-aliased edges; background: gradient from deep academic blue to vibrant cyan-teal evoking molecular energy, with subtle hexagonal lattice pattern suggesting crystallography; style: photorealistic materials (glass refraction, brushed metal, bioluminescent glow), Octane Render quality, 8K resolution, educational aesthetic, no clutter, professional scientific illustration.
